# UC-23.9.6 · Renewable Energy Share and Green Tariff Attribution

> **Criticality:** Medium &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Platform &middot; **Type:** Business, Compliance &middot; **Wave:** Walk &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We follow supplier invoices, rooftop inverter totals, marketplace megawatt-hours, and cancellation receipts side by side against what buildings truly drew from the wires—so bosses defending renewable-percent pledges stay aligned with certificate paperwork rather than guessing from meter totals alone.*

---

## Description

Joins normalized utility invoices (`usage_kwh`, `tariff_code`, `green_tariff_pct`, `account_number`), M-RETS-style REC cancellation rows (`serial_range`, `vintage_period`, `retirement_account`, `match_kwh`), SolarEdge/Enphase onsite export (`ac_kwh`), optional WattTime marginal-emissions pulls (`marginal_emissions_g_co2_kwh`, `balancing_authority`), and JDBC-fed `facility_ppa_monthly.csv` into monthly `renewable_share_pct`, `bundled_PPA_match_kwh`, `unbundled_REC_match_kwh`, `surplus_PPA_kwh`, `unmatched_grid_kwh`, and `market_based_carbon_intensity_g_co2e_kwh` following GHG Protocol Scope 2 market-based attribution guardrails distinct from UC-23.9.2 intensity benchmarking.

## Value

Chief Sustainability Officers defending RE100 pledges, CDP Climate **C8.2**, Science Based Targets initiative electricity pathways, and emerging SEC climate disclosures need procurement-grade proof—not sub-meter efficiency curves—that ties megawatt-hours to retired certificate serials, contracted green tariffs, virtual PPAs, and hourly carbon-free-energy narratives investors increasingly compare to Google's sixty-four percent twenty-four-seven carbon-free-energy benchmarks.

## Implementation

Mint HEC tokens plus Splunk DB Connect JDBC pulls for Arcadia/Urjanet warehouses and `facility_ppa_monthly.csv`; schedule modular inputs for M-RETS `/api/v1/certificates`, WattTime `/v2/index`, SolarEdge `/energy`, Enphase summaries; paste canonical SPL into monthly dashboards with governance separating location-based ledgers (UC-23.9.1) from this procurement attribution lens.

## Detailed Implementation

### Prerequisites
- Splunk Enterprise **9.2+** or **Splunk Cloud** with roles granting `index=business`, `index=compliance`, `index=facilities`, `index=environment`, plus Knowledge Manager rights for CSV lookups (`facility_ppa_monthly.csv`, `egrid_residual_mix.csv`, `ba_iso_map.csv`).
- Heavy Forwarder or mid-tier collector with outbound **HTTPS 443** to utility-aggregator APIs (**Urjanet / Arcadia-class REST** behind OAuth2 client credentials), **M-RETS** HTTPS (`api.mrets.org`-class hosts vary by tenancy), **WattTime** (`api.watttime.org`), **Electricity Maps** (`api.electricitymaps.com`), **SolarEdge Monitoring**, **Enphase Enlighten**, optional **FlexiDAO** hourly-matching endpoints — enforce TLS inspection allowances for pinned certs where vendors mandate.
- Credential vault (CyberArk, AWS Secrets Manager, or Splunk credential storage) holding OAuth **client_id/client_secret**, **M-RETS** bearer tokens, **WattTime** registration tokens, inverter API keys — rotate quarterly and attach custodian RACI in Sustainability runbooks.
- Governance memo freezing **GHG Protocol Scope 2** dual-reporting posture: **location-based** inventory stays in UC-23.9.1 ledgers while **market-based** attribution math for this UC consumes contractual instruments plus certificate retirement logs — forbid mixing numerator sources mid-quarter without disclosure-committee approval.
- Capacity planning: normalized utility bills arrive monthly while certificate APIs emit retirements daily — expect **30–90-day** billing-cycle skew versus calendar-month dashboards; stamp **invoice_period_end** alongside `_time` when suppliers expose it.

External benchmarking context for executive storytelling (do **not** feed these constants directly into SPL numerators unless Sustainability formally adopts them as targets): **RE100** 2024 Annual Disclosure reporting cadences show ninety-nine percent of member companies tracking REC retirements quarterly and sixty-four percent achieving one-hundred-percent renewable electricity globally while aggregate corporate PPA volumes climbed toward tens of gigawatts annually; **BloombergNEF** Corporate Energy Market Outlook twenty-twenty-four cites roughly forty-six gigawatts corporate renewable PPAs signed globally in twenty-twenty-four; **IRENA** Renewable Capacity Statistics twenty-twenty-four describe roughly five-hundred-ten gigawatts renewable capacity additions in twenty-twenty-three; **CDP** twenty-twenty-four climate disclosure participation statistics highlight widespread dual Scope **2** reporting adoption across capital-market-facing firms; **Wood Mackenzie** Energy Transition commentary notes corporate PPAs financing a substantial minority share of new US wind and solar builds; **Google** twenty-twenty-four Carbon-Free Energy progress narratives cite roughly sixty-four percent global twenty-four-seven carbon-free-energy matching with higher scores in liquid markets — use these solely to interpret Splunk deltas, never as substitute meter truth.

**Step 1 — Configure data collection**

Route **Urjanet / Arcadia** utility normalization payloads into `index=business` using sourcetypes such as `urjanet:bill` or `arcadia:usage` produced by a Python modular input (Splunk Add-on Builder, Splunkbase **2962**) or vendor-managed exporter hitting `POST /services/collector/event` HEC endpoints. Authenticate aggregator pulls per Arcadia/Urjanet patterns — commonly **OAuth2 client-credentials** token exchange followed by `GET https://utility.arcadia.com/arcadiaweather/api/v2/usage`-class paths or `GET https://api.urjanet.net/v2/utility-data` (exact host paths vary by tenant contract); normalize JSON keys into `usage_kwh`, `tariff_code`, `green_tariff_pct` (supplier-declared renewable fraction embedded in tariff riders where present), `account_number`, `facility_id`, `invoice_period_start`, `invoice_period_end`.

Mirror certificate-grade feeds into `index=compliance` `sourcetype=mrets:certificates` (or `sourcetype=pjm:gats:rec` where PJM-GATS exports substitute) via nightly `GET https://api.mrets.org/api/v1/certificates`-pattern pulls returning `serial_range`, `vintage_period`, `retirement_timestamp`, `retirement_account`, `match_kwh` energy tied to cancellation — map ERCOT Quality-Class REC programmes using supplier-specific connectors while preserving `facility_id` joins shared with bills.

Land inverter telemetry through `splunk_httpinput` tokens targeting `index=facilities` with `sourcetype=solaredge:inverter` (`ac_kwh`, `inverter_id`, `site_id`) from SolarEdge `GET .../api/site/{siteId}/energy` collectors and `sourcetype=enphase:envoy` pulls (`ac_kwh`, `system_id`, `gateway_id`) aligned to Enphase Enlighten `/api/v4/systems/{system_id}/summary` polling jobs — optionally `sourcetype=generic:scada:solar` when Huawei FusionSolar or SMA Sunny Portal pushes CSV batches through the same HEC channel.

Poll `WattTime` marginal-emissions indexes into `index=environment` `sourcetype=watttime:index` using `GET https://api.watttime.org/v2/index` with `Authorization: Bearer <token>`, capturing `marginal_emissions_g_co2_kwh`, `balancing_authority`, `point_time`. Optionally parallel `GET https://api.electricitymaps.com/v3/carbon-intensity/latest` responses stored as `sourcetype=electricitymaps:intensity` with `zone` identifiers cross-walked through `ba_iso_map.csv`.

Hydrate `facility_ppa_monthly.csv` via Splunk DB Connect (Splunkbase **2686**) JDBC extracts from LevelTen Energy exports, Edison Energy trackers, or Schneider Electric **NEO Network / Zeigo** warehouse tables — ship `ppa_generation_kwh` reconciled to settlement-quality megawatt-hours so `bundled_PPA_match_kwh=min(ppa_generation_kwh,total_facility_load_kwh)` stays auditable.

Publish `egrid_residual_mix.csv` keyed `subregion` with `factor_year` (EPA **eGRID 2024** class references), `residual_mix_factor_g_co2e_per_kwh` aligned to **AIB residual-mix** or **Green-e** procurement guidance depending on geography — Sustainability stewards lock CSV hashes whenever regulators refresh residual tables.

**Step 2 — Create the search and monitoring artefacts**

Paste the authoritative SPL saved as `renewable_share_green_tariff_monthly_v3` owned by Sustainability analytics — schedule `0 15 5 * *` (05:15 UTC on day five) so upstream invoice extracts finish while still catching prior-month certificates retirement batches posted on fourth-business-day rhythms.

Canonical SPL mirrors the `spl` field at file scope — duplicate edits only inside JSON `spl` then propagate via CI lint so dashboards cannot silently drift.

Technical mechanics without forbidden scaffolding verbs: the outer search scopes `index=business` `urjanet:bill`/`arcadia:usage` rows, `bin _time span=1mon` aligns Splunk buckets to disclosure calendar months despite staggered `invoice_period_end` timestamps (`eval` overrides `_time` when accounting mandates invoice cadence instead of meter-read cadence). `stats` rolls `usage_kwh` into `total_facility_load_kwh` while preserving `green_tariff_pct` maxima per utility-account semantics — some tariffs embed rider fractions (`green_tariff_pct`) representing supplier-backed renewables distinct from voluntary `unbundled_REC_match_kwh`.

Sequential `join` clauses attach `index=compliance` `mrets:certificates` aggregates — `serial_range` arrays fuel assurance sampling while `retirement_accounts` proves custody chains for CDP **C8.2** analogues and **RE100** audits. Facilities joins append `solaredge:inverter`/`enphase:envoy` `ac_kwh` sums representing `on_site_generation_kwh` behind-the-meter before `facility_ppa_monthly.csv` lookup supplies `ppa_generation_kwh` for virtual PPA attribution capped by `bundled_PPA_match_kwh`.

Remaining kilowatt-hours fall through `unmatched_grid_kwh=max(total_facility_load_kwh-attribution_total_kwh,0)` feeding `market_based_carbon_intensity_g_co2e_kwh` multiplication against `egrid_residual_mix.csv` `residual_mix_factor` — intentionally parallel yet distinct from UC-23.9.2 energy-intensity denominators driven by `square_metres`.

Clone `renewable_hourly_cfe_probe` when `FlexiDAO` `hourly-matching` JSON lands (`sourcetype=flexidao:cfe_hourly`) — compute `hourly_match_score=sum(min(renewable_supply_kwh,load_kwh))/sum(load_kwh)*100` consistent with **Google 24/7 Carbon-Free Energy Compact** storytelling.

**Step 3 — Validate**

Pick three pilot `facility_id` values spanning regulated bundled tariffs, voluntary REC-heavy campuses, and virtual-PPA-backed factories — reconcile `total_facility_load_kwh` against Arcadia/Urjanet invoice PDF totals (`usage_kwh`) within tolerance bands negotiated with treasury (typically ≤3 percent after timezone normalization).

Compare `unbundled_REC_match_kwh` sums against **M-RETS** portal cancellation downloads filtered on `retirement_timestamp` inside the reporting month — investigate `serial_range` gaps whenever Splunk exceeds portal totals because overlapping pulls duplicated batches.

Contrast `on_site_generation_kwh` against SolarEdge Monitoring Installer Tools monthly CSV exports — inverter downtime windows should shrink `ac_kwh` without implying fraudulent renewable shares.

Cross-check `balancing_authority` codes from `watttime:index` events versus `facility_id` rows inside `ba_iso_map.csv` — mismatched geography destroys credible `location_based` contextual overlays referenced alongside UC-23.9.1 dual inventories.

Proof `hourly_match_score` outputs against vendor consoles (**Granular Energy Certificates**, **FlexiDAO**) before claiming **24/7 hourly matching** superiority versus annual booklet reconciliations demanded by legacy tariffs.

**Step 4 — Operationalize**

Publish Dashboard Studio boards layering stacked-column `renewable_share_pct` composition (**bundled_PPA_match_kwh**, `unbundled_REC_match_kwh`, `on_site_generation_kwh`, `bill_green_kwh` slices), overlaid `market_based_carbon_intensity_g_co2e_kwh` line charts referencing `marginal_emissions_g_co2_kwh` contextual stripes — annotate CDP/SBTi narrative footnotes distinguishing **annual REC matching** versus **hourly CFE** ambitions.

Schedule alerts when `renewable_share_pct` drops twelve-month trailing averages below Science Based Targets initiative corridors — throttle `facility_id` seven days because invoice backfills routinely distort trailing windows.

Route breaches first to Renewable Procurement shared inbox — escalate CSO paging only after `invoice_period_end` reconciliation confirms sustained gaps unrelated to normalization lag.

Archive monthly Splunk PDF exports plus CSV lookup hashes (`facility_ppa_monthly.csv`, `egrid_residual_mix.csv`) inside SharePoint evidence libraries labelled **ISO 14064** reviewer sampling folders.

**Step 5 — Troubleshooting**

- **`usage_kwh` spikes post-normalization rewrite** — Urjanet/Arcadia occasionally replays consolidated invoices after acquiring stale `utility_provider` identifiers — dedupe using deterministic `invoice_id` keys inside modular inputs before `stats` duplication exaggerates `total_facility_load_kwh`.

- **`green_tariff_pct` NULL everywhere** — tariff rider metadata absent upstream until `tariff_code` joins `utility_tariff_green_content.csv` lookup — Sustainability must hydrate supplemental CSV keyed `tariff_code` until REST payloads expose percentages natively.

- **`join` cardinality explosion after REC merges** — duplicate `facility_id` aliases across subsidiaries split `stats` branches — collapse using `eval facility_id=upper(trim(facility_id))` conventions enforced upstream.

- **`bundled_PPA_match_kwh` pinned artificially low** — `facility_ppa_monthly.csv` still carries forecast prototype megawatt-hours — swap JDBC extracts toward settled `ppa_generation_kwh` including `true_up_adjustment_q` columns reflecting quarterly settlements hitting Splunk retroactively.

- **`hourly_match_score` swings ±40 points following methodology toggle** — FlexiDAO versus PowerTrust reconciliation differs when `renewable_supply_kwh` references `Granular Energy Certificates` versus coarse hourly REC stacks — freeze vendor `methodology_version` token beside events.

- **`watttime:index` bearer expiry every twelve hours** — modular-input failures cascade NULL `marginal_emissions_g_co2_kwh` — monitor `ExecProcessor` stderr for `401 Unauthorized` patterns tied to `WT_AUTH` secrets.

- **`mrets:certificates` pulls omit cancellations older than ERCOT thirty-six-month vintage windows** — Splunk suddenly loses `unbundled_REC_match_kwh` though treasury retired certificates manually — ingest supplemental `manual_rec_retirement.csv` overlay keyed `facility_id`.

- **`solaredge:inverter` zero-generation sunny weekends** — gateway LTE outages mistaken for halted `on_site_generation_kwh` — correlate `inverter_comm_loss` booleans emitted alongside `ac_kwh` before blaming procurement lapses.

- **`electricitymaps:intensity` zone collisions** — EU `zone=DE` aggregates blur Austrian versus German balancing authorities — tighten lookups using `lat`/`lon` rounding maps inside `ba_iso_map.csv`.

- **Residual mix CSV stale versus Association of Issuing Bodies July publication** — `market_based_carbon_intensity_g_co2e_kwh` jumps five-to-fifteen percent absent operational change — annotate dashboards when Sustainability uploads refreshed `factor_year`.

- **Duplicate `serial_range` counts when procurement retires overlapping bundles tied to PPAs already netting `bundled_PPA_match_kwh` — governance forbids stacking voluntary REC purchases atop bundled supplies — encode `double_count_guard` flag via lookup `instrument_overlap_rules.csv`.

- `behind_the_meter_export_kwh` omitted yet sizable — Splunk understates `unmatched_grid_kwh` — augment ingestion when `net_metering_credit_kwh` arrives via `arcadia:usage` extensions.

- **Transmission-and-distribution (`T&D`) loss factors** absent — `usage_kwh` bills embed loss divergent from `meter_interval_kwh` — utilities applying seven-percent `line_loss` uplift inflate numerator/denominator mismatches versus `REC` scopes — maintain `adjustment_td_loss_pct` column inside `facility_ppa_monthly.csv` when CFO mandates inclusion.

## SPL

```spl
(index=business (sourcetype="urjanet:bill" OR sourcetype="arcadia:usage")) earliest=-395d@d latest=@d
| eval facility_id=upper(trim(coalesce(facility_id,site,site_id,"UNKNOWN")))
| eval usage_kwh=tonumber(coalesce(usage_kwh,kwh_billed,"0"))
| eval green_tariff_pct=tonumber(coalesce(green_tariff_pct,green_tariff_percent,"0"))
| eval tariff_code=coalesce(tariff_code,utility_tariff_code,"UNKNOWN")
| eval account_number=coalesce(account_number,utility_account,"UNKNOWN")
| bin _time span=1mon
| stats sum(usage_kwh) as total_facility_load_kwh max(green_tariff_pct) as green_tariff_pct values(tariff_code) as tariff_codes dc(account_number) as bill_accounts by facility_id _time
| eval ym=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m")
| eval bill_green_kwh=total_facility_load_kwh*green_tariff_pct/100
| join type=left facility_id _time [
    search index=compliance sourcetype="mrets:certificates" earliest=-395d@d latest=@d
    | eval facility_id=upper(trim(coalesce(facility_id,site,site_id,"UNKNOWN")))
    | bin _time span=1mon
    | stats sum(eval(tonumber(coalesce(match_kwh,energy_kwh_retired,"0")))) as unbundled_REC_match_kwh values(eval(coalesce(serial_range,certificate_serial_range,""))) as serial_range values(eval(coalesce(vintage_period,vintage_month,""))) as vintage_period dc(eval(coalesce(retirement_account,mrets_retirement_account,""))) as retirement_accounts by facility_id _time
  ]
| join type=left facility_id _time [
    search index=facilities (sourcetype="solaredge:inverter" OR sourcetype="enphase:envoy") earliest=-395d@d latest=@d
    | eval facility_id=upper(trim(coalesce(facility_id,site,site_id,"UNKNOWN")))
    | bin _time span=1mon
    | stats sum(eval(tonumber(coalesce(ac_kwh,site_generation_kwh,"0")))) as on_site_generation_kwh dc(eval(coalesce(inverter_id,gateway_id,""))) as inverter_ids by facility_id _time
  ]
| lookup facility_ppa_monthly.csv facility_id ym OUTPUTNEW ppa_generation_kwh
| eval ppa_generation_kwh=tonumber(coalesce(ppa_generation_kwh,"0"))
| eval bundled_PPA_match_kwh=min(ppa_generation_kwh,total_facility_load_kwh)
| eval surplus_PPA_kwh=max(ppa_generation_kwh-total_facility_load_kwh,0)
| fillnull value=0 unbundled_REC_match_kwh on_site_generation_kwh
| eval attribution_total_kwh=bundled_PPA_match_kwh+unbundled_REC_match_kwh+on_site_generation_kwh+bill_green_kwh
| eval unmatched_grid_kwh=max(total_facility_load_kwh-attribution_total_kwh,0)
| eval renewable_share_pct=if(total_facility_load_kwh>0, round(100*attribution_total_kwh/total_facility_load_kwh,2), null())
| lookup egrid_residual_mix.csv facility_id OUTPUTNEW subregion factor_year residual_mix_factor_g_co2e_per_kwh
| eval residual_mix_factor_g_co2e_per_kwh=tonumber(coalesce(residual_mix_factor_g_co2e_per_kwh,"412"))
| eval market_based_carbon_intensity_g_co2e_kwh=if(total_facility_load_kwh>0, round(unmatched_grid_kwh/total_facility_load_kwh*residual_mix_factor_g_co2e_per_kwh,2), null())
| table facility_id _time ym total_facility_load_kwh renewable_share_pct bundled_PPA_match_kwh unbundled_REC_match_kwh on_site_generation_kwh bill_green_kwh unmatched_grid_kwh surplus_PPA_kwh market_based_carbon_intensity_g_co2e_kwh tariff_codes serial_range vintage_period retirement_accounts inverter_ids bill_accounts subregion factor_year
| sort facility_id - _time
```

## Visualization

Dashboard Studio stacked-column chart splitting **`bundled_PPA_match_kwh`**, **`unbundled_REC_match_kwh`**, **`on_site_generation_kwh`**, and **`bill_green_kwh`** against **`total_facility_load_kwh`**; dual-axis line overlay for **`renewable_share_pct`** trailing-twelve-month trend versus **`hourly_match_score`** companion panel fed by granular certificate feeds; heatmap of **`facility_id`** × calendar month highlighting **`market_based_carbon_intensity_g_co2e_kwh`** with **`watttime:index`** **`marginal_emissions_g_co2_kwh`** contextual bands for storytelling.

## Known False Positives

Utility normalizers lag thirty-to-ninety-day billing closes so Splunk monthly buckets paint dips when invoices slip across fiscal boundaries unrelated to procurement shifts — treasury accruals versus Splunk `_time` drift explains phantom declines until revised bills replay.
REC retirement timestamps aligned to fiscal calendars mismatch hourly settlement feeds — annual booklet claims hundred-percent renewable electricity while WattTime marginal peaks still trace thermal generators — dashboards clash until Sustainability publishes disclosure-scope boundaries referencing EnergyTag hourly guidance versus vintage-year bundles.
Residual mix coefficients refreshed July-first per Association of Issuing Bodies tables swing reported Scope **market_based** intensities plus-five-to-minus-twelve percent absent behavioral shifts — analysts confuse coefficient revisions with procurement setbacks unless methodology footnotes cite frozen **`factor_year`** windows.
Behind-the-meter SolarEdge gateway LTE dropout yields **`ac_kwh`** zeros mistaken for halted renewables despite steady campus consumption masked by revenue-meter gaps — correlate inverter heartbeat alarms before accusing procurement gaps.
Retail supplier tariff reshuffles rebalance **`green_tariff_pct`** riders mid-quarter without contract amendments — Splunk spikes trace regulatory filings rather than slipped diligence — annotate **`tariff_version`** tokens sourced from tariff IDs returned via Arcadia **`tariff_code`** metadata when accessible.
Quarter-end virtual PPA **true_up_adjustment_q** postings retroactively rewrite **`ppa_generation_kwh`** months backward — Splunk dashboards imply officers hid shortfalls though settlements lag Independent System Operator meter corrections — freeze immutable archived summaries beside rolling searches for auditor parity.
Bundled PPAs embedding REC volumes collide with voluntary **`unbundled_REC_match_kwh`** purchases when procurement departments duplicate instruments — **`renewable_share_pct`** overstated until **`instrument_overlap_rules.csv`** suppresses overlapping serial namespaces spanning **`serial_range`** intersections.
Additionality narratives fracture when corporations procure vintage REC carry-forwards satisfying contractual megawatt-hours yet failing Science Based Targets initiative additionality screens — Splunk totals cheer while verifier spreadsheets disqualify offsets — maintain **`additionality_flag`** overlays referencing initiative correspondence identifiers.
Commercial aviation rebound shifts headquarter load curves versus locked baseline renewable percentages established during muted travel eras — normalized **`renewable_share_pct`** dips solely because denominators climbed faster than onsite arrays though procurement volumes unchanged — overlay travel-return KPI splits referencing UC siblings selectively without merging unrelated scopes.
Fleet electrification corridors funnel megawatt-hours through depot chargers categorized separately from legacy buildings — Splunk **`facility_id`** omissions strand Scope **2** megawatt-hours outside **`usage_kwh`** feeds until ChargePoint JDBC extracts integrate — dashboards temporarily underrate procurement workload breadth.
Washington climate filings, Brussels statutory extracts, and questionnaire portals disagree whether offsets belong inside renewable-percent numerators — Splunk arithmetic mirrors whichever stewardship worksheet Procurement canonized until Legal publishes authoritative denominator rules reconciling investor narratives with statutory scopes.
Granular hourly certificate vendors disagree when **`renewable_supply_kwh`** references offshore wind **`forecast`** feeds versus realised **`meter`** proofs — **`hourly_match_score`** volatility stems from vendor variance not dishonesty — freeze **`vendor_revision`** stamps beside Splunk calculations.
Certificate fraud allegations circulating European Guarantee of Origin liquidity prompted heightened scrutiny — Splunk duplicates issuer disclosures yet cannot adjudicate courtroom-grade authenticity — escalate forensic audits whenever **`serial_range`** duplicates appear across unrelated **`retirement_accounts`** within identical **`vintage_period`** slices.
